message:
fix: Use interpreter mode for WAMR and fix CI workflows

- Use Mode_Interp instead of Mode_Fast_JIT since WAMR is built
  without Fast JIT support (WAMR_BUILD_FAST_JIT=0)
- This fixes "Failed to initialize WAMR runtime" errors in test262
- Add -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF to Binaryen build in test262 workflow
- Add *.rej to .gitignore
- Move quickjs patch to downstream patches/ directory

files.patch:
@@ -42,8 +42,8 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build
           git clone --depth 1 --branch version_119 https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git /tmp/binaryen
           cd /tmp/binaryen
-          git submodule update --init --depth 1
-          cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local .
+          # Skip tests - we don't need googletest submodule
+          cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF .
           ninja
           sudo ninja install
           sudo ldconfig

@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
+diff --git a/quickjs-libc.c b/quickjs-libc.c
+index ae01300..f9e63ba 100644
 --- a/quickjs-libc.c
 +++ b/quickjs-libc.c
 @@ -4507,11 +4507,14 @@ static void js_std_promise_rejection_check(JSContext *ctx)
@@ -15,4 +17,4 @@
 +        /* Don't exit - allow the event loop to continue or exit naturally */
      }
  }
-
+
